feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Intro
entry.content:
I will use this blog to share thoughts on various topics, as well as giving additional information about my work. All views and opinions expressed are mine only.

I will mainly discuss scientific contents in relation to my research activities, including but not limited to Mathematics, Artificial Intelligence and Cosmology.
